owner_next_action.title: Fill the full P0 sample-gate batch handoff.
owner_next_action.bluf: Sample is still short: visits gap 100, CTA gap 20, LINE add gap 5, days gap 3. Full P0 coverage is 18/18 rows: fill batch 1 (9) first, then batch 2 (9) before treating Week 0 sample collection as covered. Due status: day7_due_waiting_for_owner_counts.
owner_next_action.human_gate: Owner must collect aggregate counts from landing analytics and LINE OA without exporting customer rows; batch 1 can use the quick paste template, and batch 2 completes the remaining content-variant coverage.

locked_variables.hook: 48 小時內，把你的頁面改成會有人加 LINE 的版本。
locked_variables.offer: 免費 48h 成交診斷，先指出漏斗缺口，不承諾成交。
locked_variables.visual_claim: 1 變因：本輪只測 CTA text，樣本不足不換冠軍。

packets.cta_text: 加 LINE 領 48h 成交診斷
packets.draft_caption: 頁面有流量但沒人加 LINE，通常不是你不會賣，而是 hook、offer、視覺主張、CTA 有一段斷掉。這輪我只測 CTA，不動主連結、不碰客戶資料。想先知道漏在哪，先走 48h 成交診斷。

stages.operator_goal: Acknowledge the inbound lead and keep the local metric as an aggregate LINE-add count.
stages.reply_template: 我先幫你抓漏斗斷點。你不用重做整站，先回覆目前最像哪一段卡住：有點擊沒進 LINE / 進 LINE 不留資 / 留資不成交 / 還不確定。
stages.local_recording: Add one aggregate line_add count for the matching asset_id. Do not store chat text or personal identifiers.

stages.operator_goal: Count a lead only when the user shares a business-type bucket and current funnel block bucket.
stages.reply_template: 收到。我會用 48h 成交診斷看三件事：入口、CTA、LINE 後續。請用選項回：在地服務 / 電商 / 課程顧問 / B2B / 其他，還有近 7 天點擊量大概 0-99 / 100-499 / 500+ / 不確定。
stages.local_recording: Add one aggregate lead_submit count only after business context is sufficient. Do not copy the conversation into local files.

stages.operator_goal: Record only an aggregate deal count after the owner confirms the outcome.
stages.reply_template: 這一步不自動成交、不收款、不改客戶資料。成交狀態只由學誼人工確認後，回填 aggregate deal count。
stages.local_recording: Add one aggregate deal count only after owner confirmation. Never process ECPay or payment actions here.

stages.operator_goal: Protect no_quality_regression without storing raw chat content.
stages.reply_template: 若這筆進線明顯不相關，只記 aggregate quality_flag，不保存對話內容。
stages.local_recording: Add aggregate quality_flag with quality_score only. Do not store the reason text if it contains customer details.

owner_manual_steps: Review the caption and tracking URL in this packet.
If approved, paste the caption and the local tracking URL manually into the chosen surface.
Verify the platform preview manually before publishing or scheduling.
After traffic arrives, record aggregate-only page_view, cta_click, and line_add counts in the sample-gate worksheet.
Use line_inbound_playbook.md for inbound replies only; do not push or broadcast LINE messages.
packets.human_gate: Owner must explicitly approve the exact copy, surface, timing, and link before any public post or schedule action.

packets.draft_caption: 不用先重做整站。先看 100 次點擊裡，哪一步掉最多：進頁、CTA、LINE、留資、成交。這輪只改 CTA 文字，其他不動，避免看不出真正原因。

packets.draft_caption: 如果你的貼文有點擊，但 LINE 沒進線，先別急著加內容。給我現有頁面，我回一版只改 CTA 的候選頁，樣本不足不換冠軍。
